subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast friends in the Covenant! Your letter hath arrived, and as his honour Manshádí, upon him rest the Glory of God, the Most Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و چون حضرت منشادی علیه بهاء الله الابهی از
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @martyrs and martyrdom
